# Resurgo — AI Life Command Center
> https://resurgo.life

**Resurgo** (Latin: "to rise again") is an intelligent productivity operating system that helps ambitious people rebuild momentum, design better behaviors, and consistently move toward meaningful goals — without burnout or toxic productivity culture.

It combines deep AI coaching, real-time app actions, habit science, goal decomposition, and wellness tracking into one unified, beautiful command center.

## The Resurgo Philosophy
Resurgo is built on proven behavior science:
- **Tiny Habits** (BJ Fogg) — making change ridiculously small, anchored to existing routines, and immediately celebrated
- **Motivational Interviewing** — supporting autonomy and evoking the user's own motivation
- **Identity-Based Growth** — helping users become the person they want to be ("I am someone who...")
- Real-time action system — the AI doesn't just advise, it directly shapes your system (creates tasks/habits, logs progress, updates goals, etc.)

The system is intentionally humane: "Never Miss Twice" logic, gentle recovery paths, and focus on sustainable momentum rather than perfection.

## Core Capabilities
- **Intelligent Goal Decomposition**: Turn any big goal into 4-level breakdown (milestones → quarterly/weekly objectives → daily tasks) automatically
- **Living AI Coaching**: 8 distinct, deeply contextual coach personas that remember you across sessions and directly modify your tasks, habits, goals, and logs in real-time
- **Habit System with Never Miss Twice**: Intelligent streak protection that treats one missed day as human and helps you recover on Day 2 instead of quitting
- **Focus & Deep Work**: Pomodoro, Flowtime, custom timers + distraction pattern logging
- **Wellness Integration**: Mood tracking, energy logging, sleep, nutrition, and breathing tools
- **Real-Time Actions**: AI can instantly create/update tasks, habits, goals, log moods, celebrate wins, schedule reminders, and more
- **Weekly Reviews & Reflection**: Structured AI-guided reviews that turn experience into insight
- **Finance & Business Mode**: Dedicated support for budgeting and startup/business goal systems

## The 8 AI Coach Personas
Each coach has a distinct voice, philosophy, and expertise:
- **MARCUS** — Stoic strategist. Clear-headed, disciplined, long-term thinking.
- **AURORA** — Wellness & energy guide. Gentle, intuitive, focused on sustainable energy and recovery.
- **TITAN** — Physical & mental toughness coach. Direct, motivational, performance-oriented.
- **SAGE** — Finance & resource tactician. Analytical, strategic, wealth-building focused.
- **PHOENIX** — Comeback & resilience specialist. Empathetic but firm for people rebuilding after setbacks.
- **NOVA** — Creative systems & innovation coach. Playful, expansive, helps creators build sustainable output.
- **ORACLE** — Strategic foresight & decision architect. Big-picture, scenario thinking.
- **NEXUS** — Holistic integrator. Synthesizes all areas of life into coherent systems.

You can switch coaches or let the system recommend the best one for the moment.

## How the AI Coaching Works

When a user sends a message to any coach, the AI:
1. Understands the emotional and practical content of the message
2. Takes real-time actions in the app (creates tasks, logs mood, tracks habits, schedules reminders, logs expenses)
3. Responds with a warm, concise coaching message grounded in behavioral science

The coaching system uses established psychological frameworks:
- **Fogg Behavior Model**: Behavior = Motivation × Ability × Prompt. When something isn't happening, reduce friction.
- **Motivational Interviewing**: When resistance appears, explore it — don't lecture through it.
- **Self-Determination Theory**: Support autonomy (choices), competence (celebrate wins), and relatedness (be warm).
- **Implementation Intentions**: Convert vague goals to specific "If X, then Y" plans with when/where/what.
- **Identity-Based Habits**: Connect behaviors to identity ("I am someone who exercises") rather than outcomes.

The AI also includes safety protocols: if a user mentions self-harm or crisis, the system immediately provides crisis resources (iCall India: 9152987821, 988 Lifeline US, findahelpline.com) and does not attempt to coach through it.

## Technical Architecture

| Layer          | Technology                                      |
|----------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| Framework      | Next.js 14 (App Router, server components)       |
| Language       | TypeScript (strict mode)                         |
| Authentication | Clerk (email, Google, GitHub OAuth)              |
| Database       | Convex (real-time reactive backend)              |
| Styling        | Tailwind CSS                                     |
| Primary AI     | Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) — fast inference            |
| Fallback AI    | OpenRouter (multi-model), Puter.js (free tier)   |
| Payments       | Dodo Payments                                    |
| Deployment     | Vercel                                           |
| PWA            | Installable on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS      |

### Why Convex?
Convex provides real-time data synchronization. When the AI creates a task during a coaching conversation, the user sees it appear instantly in their task list without a page refresh. This is critical for the "Living System" experience where AI actions and UI are in sync.

### AI Action System
The AI doesn't just chat — it executes structured actions. Each AI response includes:
- A coaching message (≤1500 characters)
- Zero or more immediate actions (create_task, update_task, delete_task, create_habit, update_habit, create_goal, update_goal, log_mood, log_energy, log_expense, log_journal, schedule_reminder, start_focus_session)
- Zero or more suggestions requiring user confirmation
- A memory patch that persists context for future sessions


## Key Differentiators
- Real behavior change science instead of generic advice
- AI that **acts** inside your system, not just talks
- 8 specialized personas with persistent memory
- "Never Miss Twice" habit psychology
- 4-level automatic goal decomposition
- Terminal-inspired aesthetic built for developers, founders, and deep thinkers
- Extremely generous free tier with no core feature paywalls
- Real-time sync across web + PWA (installable on all platforms)

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript
- Real-time backend: Convex
- Auth: Clerk
- AI: Groq (Llama 3.3 70B primary), OpenRouter fallback
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- PWA + cross-platform install support
- Payments: Dodo Payments

## Pricing (as of March 2026)
- **Free**: Full access to all 8 coaches, goal decomposition, habit tracking, focus sessions, basic analytics, and real-time AI actions. No credit card required.
- **Pro** ($4.99/month): Unlimited habits/goals, advanced models, priority support, API access.
- **Pro Yearly** ($29.99/year): 50% savings.
- **Lifetime** ($49.99 one-time): Permanent access to everything.

## Who Resurgo Is For
- Developers, indie hackers, and founders managing complex, multi-domain lives
- People in comeback seasons who want to rise again stronger
- Productivity enthusiasts who hate bloat and friction
- Anyone serious about building lasting habits and identity-level change

## Why Resurgo Stands Out
It is the rare system that is simultaneously deeply intelligent and genuinely humane. It respects your time, your energy, and your need for real progress — not just another dopamine-hit todo list.
